summary: South Bay companies pulled in roughly $4.3 billion across 23 funding rounds in March and early April, with AI, semiconductors, and robotics leading the way. Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), Ayar Labs (San Jose), and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) each landed half-billion-dollar checks, while most firms are hiring—though a few are tightening headcount. No major tech events this week, but the region's venture appetite remains robust.
